assertions.assertion: Configuration store calls MigrationsHistoryTable with the schema parameter set to "idscfg"
assertions.rationale: MigrationsHistoryTable is not called; only mentioned as a possibility.

assertions.assertion: Operational store calls MigrationsHistoryTable with the schema parameter set to "idsop"
Both store registrations include MigrationsAssembly pointing to the host project
assertions.rationale: MigrationsAssembly is not set in either store.
